parsed_output.justification: Kaelan and Jessica both claim to be Villagers. Daniel attempts to cast suspicion on Kaelan by suggesting he is the Tanner or the Werewolf without providing any evidence. Furthermore, Daniel later suggests the group is 'good with the center,' which would lead to a Circle Vote; since a Circle Vote allows any present Werewolves to survive, this behavior is highly suspicious and characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to manipulate the outcome.
